sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 279 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection Nos. 10, 26 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No. 2184/24 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 22.10.2025 Mr. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz, advocate, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press this reference application. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
